text:
Randal L. Schwartz wrote:
>>>>>> "olli" == olli hauer <ohauer@gmx.de> writes:
> 
> olli> I hope you do not have spamd in production with parameter -b since it
> olli> changed with spamd-4.1.x *from greylisting to blacklisting* nearly 3
> olli> years ago.
> 
> Actually, the problem was triggered even with obspamd_flags=-v.
> 

Can you describe the problem a little bit more, maybe with all the (ob)spamd 
params in use?

At the moment I have only the info mounting fdescfs to /dev/fd is useless,
eventually I can improve the check for FreeBSD8 (I'm still running 6.x/7.x in 
production and 8.x only for testing and porting).

> (Not sure why... I don't grok shell as well since I've done everything
> in Perl for 20 years.)
> 
> In any case, the code is wrong. :)
> 

I have the same issues with perl, perhaps I should buy one of your books :)
